title: Elytra Assistant
description: Elytra Assistant is a client-side Minecraft mod that enhances the Elytra flying experience with useful features and quality-of-life improvements
body:
![Background Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00ad4f4d5393c5fa0222a6577695e6c303ea7236.png)

[![GitHub Release](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/Xurify/ElytraAssistant?label=release&logo=github)](https://github.com/Xurify/ElytraAssistant/releases)
![Environment: Client](https://img.shields.io/badge/Environment-Client-1976d2?style=flat-square)
[![Modloader: Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod_Loader-Fabric-lightyellow?style=flat-square)
](https://fabricmc.net/)
[![Not supported: Forge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Not_Supported-Forge-c1121f?style=flat-square)](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/)

Elytra Assistant is a client-side Minecraft mod that elevates your Elytra flying experience with intelligent activation/swapping, 
flight time estimation, and quality-of-life improvements. Enhance your aerial adventures and optimize your resources with smart, seamless controls.

## 📖 Features

### Elytra Auto-Equip / Chestplate Swap
Automatically swaps between Elytra and Chestplate based on your actions. Equips Elytra when jumping from heights or during flight, and switches back to Chestplate upon landing for better protection.

### Keybind Swap
Includes a keybind for manual swapping (default key: ~).

### Estimated Remaining Flight Time Tooltip
Displays an estimate of remaining flight time on the Elytra tooltip, taking into account current durability and Unbreaking enchantment level for accurate estimates.

### Firework Rocket Waste Prevention
Prevents accidental use of firework rockets when not wearing an Elytra, helping conserve resources and avoid wasting fireworks unintentionally.


## 🔗 Links

Visit the **[GitHub](https://github.com/Xurify/ElytraAssistant)** to view the source code
